raise_justifications.desktop/macos/Desktop/Sources/FloatingCo: Agent completion presentation now follows the canonical terminal lifecycle used by PTT and chat.
The Second Brain onboarding, reach-error, and notch-moment UI keeps the hover menu agent-only and routes idle notch taps through main chat.
Second Brain continuous-chat routing shares window geometry with agent-only hover sizing and canonical idle-notch chat ownership.
The owning turn manager carries privacy-bounded push-to-talk capture-lifecycle diagnostics wiring alongside strict concurrency, response-critical batch STT, and parallel screen-context capture.
URLSession is invalidated on transport teardown via an explicit backing optional to break the delegate retain cycle and stop per-reconnect session leaks; strict-concurrency annotations remain.
